title: Force unwrap client.nick! in setTopic can crash server
description: In the setTopic method, line 459 does 'chat.topicNick = client.nick!' which force-unwraps an Optional String?. The nick property (Client.swift line 21) is declared as 'public var nick:String?'. If a client sends a set_topic message before setting a nick (which is allowed by the state machine since set_nick is optional before login), this will crash with a fatal error. This is a remotely triggerable denial-of-service.
recommendation: Replace with: chat.topicNick = client.nick ?? "" or add a guard let nick = client.nick at the beginning of the method.
